---
title: "Contact Info"
toc: false
---

::: {style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; min-height: 65vh; text-align: center; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto;"}

## Get In Touch

If you're interested in collaborating or want to discuss data analytics opportunities, feel free to reach out.

<ul style="list-style-type: none; padding: 0; display: inline-block; text-align: left;">
  <li>**Email**: {{< fa envelope >}} augustinemeeval@gmail.com</li>
  <li>**Phone**: {{< fa phone >}} +353-892038335</li>
  <li>**Address**: {{< fa home >}} 109 Parnell Road, Dublin 1</li>
  <li>**LinkedIn**: {{< fa brands linkedin >}} [linkedin.com/in/meeval-augustine-60518323a](https://www.linkedin.com/in/meeval-augustine-60518323a)</li>
  <li>**GitHub**: {{< fa brands github >}} [github.com/Meeval20](https://github.com/Meeval20)</li>
</ul>

:::
